videos.headline: Washington State WR escapes sea of defenders for sensational TD
videos.description: Washington State's Josh Kelly makes the Oregon State defense look silly with an incredible catch and run for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Washington State WR escapes sea of defenders for incredible TD) 2023/9/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cameron Ward airs out early 63-yard TD for Washington State
videos.description: Washington State QB Cameron Ward goes deep to Kyle Williams for a 63-yard touchdown on the second play from scrimmage.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cameron Ward airs out early 63-yard TD for Washington State) 2023/09/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cameron Ward pushes pile into end zone for Washington State
videos.description: Washington State QB Cameron Ward keeps it himself to score a touchdown vs. Oregon State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cameron Ward pushes pile into end zone for Washington State) 2023/09/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Deshaun Fenwick scampers in for 38-yard Oregon State TD
videos.description: Deshaun Fenwick breaks multiple tackles to score a 38-yard touchdown for Oregon State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Deshaun Fenwick scampers in for 38-yard Oregon State TD) 2023/09/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cameron Ward buys time in pocket to sling 3rd TD of first half
videos.description: Washington State QB Cameron Ward evades pressure before connecting with Josh Kelly for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cameron Ward buys time in pocket to sling 3rd TD of first half) 2023/09/23 ESHEET
